name: zonewise-video
description: ZoneWise GTM video v2 — Remotion + light mode + Ariel's story + nationwide

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts ZoneWiseV2 out/zonewise-demo-v2.mp4 --fps=30 --width=1920 --height=1080 --concurrency=4
scripts.render-hook: npx remotion render src/index.ts ZoneWiseV2 out/hook.mp4 --fps=30 --width=1920 --height=1080 --frames=0-749 --concurrency=4
scripts.render-hook-gif: npm run render-hook && ffmpeg -i out/hook.mp4 -vf 'fps=15,scale=1280:-1:flags=lanczos,split[s0][s1];[s0]palettegen[p];[s1][p]paletteuse' out/hook.gif
